title: centaurea scabiosa subsp. pseudoscabiosa
intro: Centaurea scabiosa subsp. pseudoscabiosa is a subspecies of the cornflower plant, known for its vibrant blue flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Centaurea scabiosa subsp. pseudoscabiosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its medicinal properties can also be extracted through infusion or decoction for use in herbal remedies.
